title: InvestigationRun
description: An immutable, replayable record of an investigation workflow execution.

run_id.description: A unique, deterministic identifier for this run.

inputs.description: The exact inputs provided to the investigation.

scope.description: The defined scope or boundaries of the investigation.

tools_invoked.description: A deterministically ordered list of tools invoked during the run.

outputs_summary.description: A summary of the outputs generated by the investigation.
